Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) AS sample_count, (count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(1) / CAST(count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum((resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade = 1 AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/f574a7ee21f5a78630b046ef0c6f09050fa99b9901e86db46d45a0e8b8aea2b8/5cfe3fb9-b0eb-41df-8d95-0b3f910e16bb/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
